texto: The nicest people I meet in life are those who work hard for everything they have
autor: the meanest people I meet in life are those who have everything handed to them.
explicacao: Citação de the meanest people I meet in life are those who have everything handed to them. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The nicest people I meet in life are those who work hard for everything they have” articula reflexao, ken-poirot, nicest em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e reflexao.
